import React from 'react'
  import { MDXTag } from '@mdx-js/tag'
  import {Playground} from "docz";
import Button from "./Button";

const layoutProps = {
  
};
export default class MDXContent extends React.Component {
  constructor(props) {
    super(props)
    this.layout = null
  }
  render() {
    const { components, ...props } = this.props

    return <MDXTag
             name="wrapper"
             
             components={components}><MDXTag name="h1" components={components} props={{"id":"button"}}>{`Button`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}><MDXTag name="em" components={components} parentName="p">{`A pretty button`}</MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="h2" components={components} props={{"id":"props"}}>{`Props`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}><MDXTag name="em" components={components} parentName="p">{`Extends `}<MDXTag name="inlineCode" components={components} parentName="em">{`Element`}</MDXTag></MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="table" components={components}>
<MDXTag name="thead" components={components} parentName="table">
<MDXTag name="tr" components={components} parentName="thead">
<MDXTag name="th" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Name`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="th" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Type`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="th" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Default`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="th" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Description`}</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="tbody" components={components} parentName="table">
<MDXTag name="tr" components={components} parentName="tbody">
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`isRaised`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}><MDXTag name="inlineCode" components={components} parentName="td">{`boolean`}</MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}><MDXTag name="inlineCode" components={components} parentName="td">{`true`}</MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Shows a translate-to-top animation`}</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="tr" components={components} parentName="tbody">
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`isFit`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}><MDXTag name="inlineCode" components={components} parentName="td">{`boolean`}</MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}><MDXTag name="inlineCode" components={components} parentName="td">{`true`}</MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Fits to its content`}</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="h2" components={components} props={{"id":"usage"}}>{`Usage`}</MDXTag>


<Playground __position={0} __code={'<Button bg=\"primary\" c=\"light\" mr={12}>\n  Lorem ipsum\n</Button>\n<Button bg=\"secondary\" c=\"light\" mr={12}>\n  Lorem ipsum\n</Button>\n<Button mr={12}>Lorem ipsum</Button>\n<Button c=\"primary\">Lorem ipsum</Button>'} __scope={{props: this ? this.props : props,Playground,Button}}   <Button bg="primary" c="light" mr={12}>Lorem ipsum</Button>
  <Button bg="secondary" c="light" mr={12}>Lorem ipsum</Button>
  <Button mr={12}>Lorem ipsum</Button>
  <Button c="primary">Lorem ipsum</Button>
</Playground>
           </MDXTag>
  }
}
MDXContent.isMDXComponent = true
